subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ1.2
question_html:
0.02 mol of zinc is added to 10.0 cm3 of 1.0 mol dm–3 hydrochloric acid.

Zn (s) + 2HCl (aq) → ZnCl2 (aq) + H2 (g)

How many moles of hydrogen are produced?

A.  0.005

B.  0.01

C.  0.02

D.  0.04
examiners_html: Higher scoring candidates managed to estimate moles of gas produced in the reaction of zinc with hydrochloric acid solution.
